creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rakuco
Date: Sat Nov 23 16:25:00 UTC 2019
New revision: 518252
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/518252

Log:
  Update to 2.3.3.

  Also exclude 3rdparty/ and a few other directories when extracting the
  tarball. This saves some disk space and prevents any bundled
  dependencies from accidentally sneaking in.

  Based on a patch submitted by mi@.

  PR:		240197
  Submitted by:	mi

Changes:
  head/print/lyx/Makefile
  head/print/lyx/distinfo
  head/print/lyx/files/patch-Makefile.am
  head/print/lyx/files/patch-boost-1.69
  head/print/lyx/files/patch-configure.ac
  head/print/lyx/pkg-plist
